author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tmux-perms
content: Decision: Chose merge-based approach for settings.json (like existing write_mcp_json_merged) over simple overwrite. This preserves user-added allowedTools entries on re-init while still updating crosslink-managed hooks. Added Bash(tmux *) and Bash(git worktree *) as the two permission patterns — broad enough to cover all subcommands without needing individual entries.
